name: Brown Seed Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all-purpose flour and whole wheat flour.
2. Add natural bran, rolled oats, sesame seeds, and poppy seeds.
3. Mix in baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. Stir in liquid honey until the mixture is sticky.
5. Gradually add plain yogurt to form a dough.
6. Transfer the dough into a greased loaf pan (9x5 inches or 2L).
7. Bake at 375°F for 40 minutes, or until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean.
